_comment: Links the ProveIt bottling demo to the EXISTING Conv_Simple evidence — references only, no duplication. The real manuals/manifest/answer-card/MQTT-report live under demo/evidence/ and demo/reports/. Simulated assets have no OEM manual (they are simulated, not real equipment) — that is stated honestly, never fabricated.
simulated_assets_note: Simulated bottling assets (tank01, mixer01, filler01, capper01, labeler01, casepacker01) have NO OEM manual on file — they are deterministic simulations, not real equipment. Their scenario cards say so plainly; no manufacturer or part number is invented.
